---
name: Bug report
description: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce:
1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Environment
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (output of `python --version`)
- App version/commit: (e.g. from `git describe` or README)

## Config / context
- How you run the app: (CLI one-shot, `--web`, config path)
- Relevant config (redact secrets): (e.g. snippet of config YAML)

## Logs or screenshots
If applicable, add logs or screenshots (redact sensitive data).

## Additional context
Any other context that might help.
